summary_one_line: Profile class/colorspace tag bytes that build a pipeline whose adjacent stages have mismatched channel counts, taking the true branch.

hypotheses.what_input_feature: Header tag bytes at offsets 0x0c-0x0f (device class) and 0x10-0x17 (data/PCS colorspace signatures) set to non-default four-char codes (e.g. 'link','spac','scnr' with 'MCHC'/'GRAY'/'Lab ') so the constructed cmsPipeline contains adjacent stages where next->InputChannels != prev->OutputChannels, reaching the true (return FALSE) side of cmslut.c:1305.
hypotheses.why_winner_satisfies: value_profile_cmplog winning seeds carry varied class codes at 0x0c-0x0f ('link','prtr','spac','scnr') and varied colorspaces at 0x10-0x17 ('MCHCXYZ ','GRAYXYZ ','RGB Lab '), driving heterogeneous channel-count pipeline stages; the per-role overlay marks line 1306 'return FALSE' as W-only and the branch hitcount is 107 for the winner.
hypotheses.why_loser_doesnt: value_profile loser seeds are byte-locked to class 'mntr' at 0x0c-0x0f and colorspace 'RGB XYZ ' at 0x10-0x17 across all 10 seeds, building channel-consistent pipelines that always take the false side (T=0 F=670 at L1305) and never resolve the branch (resolved=0/10).
hypotheses.mechanism_attribution: The only technique delta between value_profile_cmplog and value_profile is the I2SRandReplace input-to-state mutator. The four-char ICC signature codes ('link','MCHC','GRAY','Lab ') are exact magic-string comparands tested in lcms profile dispatch; I2SRandReplace logs the runtime CMP operand and splices the exact literal into the input bytes, letting vpc populate non-'mntr'/'RGB'/'XYZ' tag fields that select differently-shaped pipelines. value_profile lacks I2SRandReplace and its CMP_MAP Hamming gradient cannot synthesize the exact four-char tag, so it stays pinned to the default class.

evidence_trail.claim: The blocker is a channel-count mismatch check inside BlessLUT's pipeline-chain walk; the globally blocked side is the true branch.
The winner-only resolves the true side (return FALSE) of the blocker per the per-role overlay.
The winner takes the true branch 14 times while the loser never does (T=0).
evidence_trail.exact_quote: d=1   L1305  T=14 F=303  T=0 F=670  if (next->InputChannels != prev->OutputChannels)

evidence_trail.claim: Winner seeds carry varied device-class codes at offset 0x0c-0x0f such as 'link', differing from the loser-locked 'mntr'.
Winner seeds vary the data/PCS colorspace signature fields at 0x10-0x17 (e.g. 'MCHCXYZ ').
All loser seeds are byte-locked to device class 'mntr' at offset 0x0c-0x0f.
The per-offset byte diff shows W and L differ at offsets 0x0c and 0x0d where W is varied and L is locked to 'm'/'n'.
The only mutation-technique difference for the involved winner is the addition of I2SRandReplace.
The loser fuzzer value_profile lacks I2SRandReplace.

mechanism_consistency_check.verification_method: ran `python3 tools/db_query.py lineage --branch 2204 --role W --fuzzer value_profile_cmplog --trial 1 --seed 0f8bbd51a2d5664d` and observed an I2S-floor dash row (mutation_op = -) at depth 15 of the 16-level ancestor chain, the floor signal for an unwrapped I2SRandReplace find in vpc under the current build.

falsifiability.would_be_refuted_by: A synthetic harness with a fixed pipeline whose stage channel counts are mismatched regardless of any input tag bytes (no exact four-char comparand gate) where value_profile_cmplog shows no advantage over value_profile in reaching the true branch.

weakest_evidence_point: The exact data-path from the varied tag/colorspace bytes to a mismatched-channel pipeline is inferred from source structure, not directly traced; multiple class/colorspace combinations map to differing channel counts but the specific gating comparand is not shown in the cited source window.
